markdown:
**Encoder.** BERT uses the Transformer in encoder form, not as a decoder.

The paper states this directly in its Model Architecture section: "BERT's model architecture is a multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder based on the original implementation described in Vaswani et al. (2017) and released in the tensor2tensor library." [1]

This is also reflected in the model's name — **B**idirectional **E**ncoder **R**epresentations from **T**ransformers — and in the paper's contrast with OpenAI GPT, which uses a left-to-right (decoder-style, causally masked) Transformer, whereas "the BERT Transformer uses bidirectional self-attention." [1]

Sources
[1] BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding, 3 BERT, p. 3
summary:

The paper states this directly in its Model Architecture section: "BERT's model architecture is a multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder based on the original implementation described in Vaswani et al. (2017) and released in the tensor2tensor library." [1]

This is also reflected in the model's name — **B**idirection
